message:
feat(zendesk): add analytics reporting and auto-categorization modules

- analytics.rs: MetricSeries with trend analysis, aggregation, ReportSummary (167 tests)
- categorize.rs: CategorizationEngine with rule matching, escalation flags, safe-by-default (144 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,13 +24,21 @@
     clippy::assertions_on_constants,
     clippy::struct_field_names,
     clippy::suboptimal_flops,
+    clippy::manual_midpoint,
+    clippy::manual_range_contains,
+    clippy::must_use_candidate,
+    clippy::return_self_not_must_use,
+    clippy::similar_names,
+    clippy::suspicious_operation_groupings,
     clippy::too_many_arguments,
     clippy::too_many_lines,
     clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref,
     clippy::unreadable_literal,
     clippy::unused_async
 )]
 
+pub mod analytics;
+pub mod categorize;
 pub mod client;
 pub mod connector;
 pub mod error;
